benchmark_policy.image_embedding_queries: planned but disabled until permission gate passes
benchmark_policy.public_gallery_queries: planned but disabled until public display rights pass
benchmark_policy.evaluation_note: This is a static benchmark for retrieval metadata quality, not a live vector database evaluation.

queries.user_query: Find main figures that explain a method pipeline with inputs, modules, outputs, and evidence alignment.
expected_response_constraints: return safe summaries and structural lessons only
do not reproduce source captions verbatim
do not provide source images for reuse
include permission warning when image reuse is requested
